Drivers and functions for FPGA-based and ICE40LP display initialization, configuration, and control.


## Files
- **[boot_fpga.c](boot_fpga.c.md)**: Controls FPGA-based display initialization, configuration, and error handling for the boot process.
- **[ice40lp.c](ice40lp.c.md)**: Driver for initializing and controlling the ICE40LP display via SPI on STM32F7 microcontrollers.
- **[ice40lp.h](ice40lp.h.md)**: Functions for controlling and programming the ICE40LP display, including power and command operations.
- **[ice40lp_definitions.h](ice40lp_definitions.h.md)**: Defines the ICE40LPDevice structure for SPI configuration and control signals.
